english translation text:
THE LADY WHO TAUGHT THE WORLD ABOUT HIJAB
HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR

urdu transliteration text:
Ghar Se Bahar Bhi Na Aane Wali
Aayi Bazaaron Mein Zainab
@HujjatELC
Parda Duniya Ko Sikhaane Wali - The Lady Who Taught The World About Hijab
english translation text: THE ONE WHO NEVER STEPPED OUT OF HER HOUSE WITHOUT A VEIL HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR

urdu transliteration text:
Jisne Baba Se Chhura-e-the Kahi Baar Aseer
Qaidi Azaad Karane Wali
Aayi Bazaaron Mein Zainab
@HujjatELC
Parda Duniya Ko Sikhaane Wali - The Lady Who Taught The World About Hijab
english translation text:
THE ONE WHO USED TO ASK HER FATHER TO FREE THE PRISONERS
HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR

urdu transliteration text:
Jalte Khaimon Se Utha Layi Abbas Ke Baad
Ali Aabid Ko Bachane Wali
Aayi Bazaaron Mein Zainab
@HujjatELC
Parda Duniya Ko Sikhaane Wali - The Lady Who Taught The World About Hijab
english translation text:
FROM THE BURNING TENTS, SHE WAS THE ONE, AFTER ABBAS LEFT, WHO SAVED IMAM SAJJAD,
SHE HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR

urdu transliteration text:
Deen Ki Khaatir Ye Bibi Saalar Bani
Ban Ke Abbas Dikhaane Wali
Aayi Bazaaron Mein Zainab
@HujjatELC
Parda Duniya Ko Sikhaane Wali - The Lady Who Taught The World About Hijab
english translation text:
FOR THE SAKE OF THE RELIGION SHE BECAME THE PROTECTOR,
THE ONE WHO TOOK THE PLACE OF ABBAS,
SHE HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR

urdu transliteration text:
Apne Seenay Pe Sakina Ko Zindanon Mein
Baad Bhayi Ke Sulaane Wali
Aayi Bazaaron Mein Zainab
@HujjatELC
Parda Duniya Ko Sikhaane Wali - The Lady Who Taught The World About Hijab
english translation text:
IN THE PRISON SHE KEPT SAKINA ON HER CHEST,
AFTER HER BROTHER SHE WAS THE ONE WHO MADE SAKINA SLEEP,
SHE HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR

urdu transliteration text:
Nange Sar Parti Rahi Khutbe Bazaaron Mein
Kasre Dushman Ko Hilane Wali
Aayi Bazaaron Mein Zainab
@HujjatELC
Parda Duniya Ko Sikhaane Wali - The Lady Who Taught The World About Hijab
english translation text:
SHE DELIVERED A SERMON IN THE BAZAAR IN HER HELPLESS CONDITION,
THE ONE WHO SHOOK THE ENEMY
HAS BEEN BROUGHT INTO THE BAZAAR
